title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War: Rising Conflict
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Luffy, Dadan, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 10–13.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral GARP!!! What are you...!!?

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: sORRY i COULDN'T LET YOU SAVE ME...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What the hell are you talking about!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Somebody help him!!! Please save ace!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He burned up my insides... zeeh...
